class.name: nav_algo_smac_ros1/SmacLatticePlannerROS
class.description: ROS 1 wrapper around the ported Nav2 Humble SmacPlannerLattice (state-lattice global A*). Math layer = nav_algo_core's AStarAlgorithm<NodeLattice> + AnalyticExpansion + Smoother, byte-identical to Humble upstream. This plugin handles the move_base coupling: param load (yaml), costmap binding, plan output.
